# Decifer Learning

> British curriculum learning for Years 1 to 11 (KS1 to KS4/GCSE). Quality-checked Maths, English, Science, History and Geography, with a parent learning map that shows exactly where each child stands. Built for British-curriculum families in the UAE, the Gulf and worldwide.

Decifer Learning is a product of DECIFER, an AI intelligence company (https://www.decifer.io). It supports learning and does not replace teachers, schools or parents.

## Company

- [DECIFER (parent)](https://www.decifer.io): the company behind Decifer Trading, Decifer Learning and Decifer Marketing
- [DECIFER Trading](https://decifertrading.com): sibling product, market intelligence
- [DECIFER Marketing](https://decifermarketing.com): sibling product, marketing intelligence
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/deciferdxb/): DECIFER's official company page. Note: linkedin.com/company/decifer (without "dxb") is a different, unrelated page.
